caption: A screen recording captures a digital workspace featuring a complex network map on a dark background. The map consists of various circular nodes connected by lines, with one node expanded into a large white rectangular window containing an illustration of a person and text. The visible text within this window includes "CLIP DEMO: MG" and "MAP 100 DEMO: just' map...". To the right of the network, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt, speaking directly to the camera. Along the top of the screen, several browser tabs are open, with titles such as "Trust & Learning by Syntechy", "Future of Society by Syntechy", and "Rural Community Food System". At the bottom of the screen, a taskbar displays various application icons. Throughout the sequence, the screen remains largely static, though the man in the video feed moves slightly while speaking.
